gameContext.customOverride:
Output ONE token: UP|DOWN|LEFT|RIGHT|WAIT
Scoring: hole (-1), kill exit (+1). Avoid: hole. Win: clear all exit. Lose: die; timeout. Mechanics: push greenbox, push redbox, push bluebox, push box, collect normalSwitch to transform, collect redSwitch to transform, collect blueSwitch to transform, collect greenSwitch to transform.
